system.effect: The psyker grants himself or an ally a +10 bonus to all tests for the duration of the power by providing constant precognitive guidance.

description.value: The psyker peers into the immediate future and guides the actions of himself or an ally with whispered precognitive advice. The target gains a +10 bonus to all tests for the duration of the power. For every 10 points by which the Focus Power test is passed, the bonus increases by +10.
